title: azorella haastii
intro: Azorella haastii, also known as Astelia haastii or Mountain Astelia, is a plant species native to New Zealand, belonging to the Asteliaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Azorella haastii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antiviral activity. Azorella haastii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
